measurement_context.runtime: docker frontend dev server at http://localhost:13000
measurement_context.method: Playwright headless navigation timing and resource entries
measurement_context.note: Production bundle audit blocked because frontend build fails TypeScript checks

build_status.build_command: docker exec privod_next_frontend npm run build

diagnosis: Cold start payload in dev is large (6.2 MB transfer equivalent on root route)
No production benchmark is currently trustworthy due to build failure
Data tables render full page rows without virtualization
Bundle split strategy is minimal (vendor/charts/table/query only) and not route-domain aware

recommendations.action: Fix build pipeline and produce production artifacts before further optimization
recommendations.target: stable CI build in <10 min with zero TS errors

recommendations.action: Introduce route-level chunking by domain modules (projects, finance, warehouse, workflow, analytics)
Implement table virtualization and server-side pagination for heavy lists
Set JS/CSS performance budgets in CI and block regressions
recommendations.target: max initial JS budget per route and automatic regression alerting

recommendations.action: Add prefetch strategy for likely next routes in happy paths
